prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body character design, centered, pure white background, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors, no text / no symbols / no garbled characters / no words, a beautiful teenage girl with an extremely high level of beauty, delicate and ethereal features, a face that serves as a perfect mirror, pale and almost translucent skin, large and expressive eyes with a complex, reflective quality — their color seems to shift subtly, mirroring the emotional state of the viewer, long, silver-white hair with a slight metallic sheen, styled in a straight, flowing manner that reaches her mid-back, with a few stray strands framing her face, a slender and graceful figure, average height, wearing a modified, slightly tattered school uniform from the ruined academy, the uniform is primarily dark navy blue with white accents, the jacket is unbuttoned over a simple white shirt, the skirt is knee-length, the fabric shows subtle signs of wear and tear, hinting at the post-apocalyptic setting, her expression is neutral yet deeply introspective, with a hint of distant sorrow in her eyes, she stands with a quiet, poised stillness, her posture neither defensive nor inviting, embodying the theme of identity confusion and the boundary between reality and illusion, the overall atmosphere is abstract and symbolic, reflecting the game's themes of fragmented self and mirrored psyches., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
